<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a single app secret by name"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/secrets/{secret-name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
